return(function(h,B,L,J,E,Q,n,x,A,F,u,X,f,t,k,Y,Z,j,N,G,c,m,z,g)Y,N,m,z,j,f,A,Z,x,k,c,g,X,F,t,u,G=593046-593046,function(h,d)local B=c(d)local L=function(L,J,E,Q,n)return z(h,{L;J,E,Q,n},d,B)end
